notes: 15-step r4 tour for Changing the Display Language. Liam voice throughout. Steps 1-3 on dashboard (globe/presenter language); steps 4-11 navigate to editor settings and select Español for audience; steps 12-15 show preview in Spanish. Supersedes r3 (A7vjgJjMOWA).

steps.display_text: AhaSlides has two language settings — one for the presenter interface, one for the audience.
steps.tts_text: AhaSlides has two language settings — one for the presenter interface, one for the audience.

steps.display_text: Click the globe icon in the header to open the presenter language menu.
steps.tts_text: Click the globe icon in the header to open the presenter language menu.

steps.display_text: Choose from 27 interface languages — the app switches instantly.
steps.tts_text: Choose from 27 interface languages — the app switches instantly.

steps.display_text: The audience display language lives inside each presentation's Settings. Click New presentation to open the editor.
steps.tts_text: The audience display language lives inside each presentation's Settings. Click New presentation to open the editor.

steps.display_text: Click Poll to add a slide. Each presentation can target a different audience language.
steps.tts_text: Click Poll to add a slide. Each presentation can target a different audience language.

steps.display_text: Now click the Settings icon on the right panel to open the presentation settings.
steps.tts_text: Now click the Settings icon on the right panel to open the presentation settings.

steps.display_text: In the Settings panel, click Presentation language in the left menu.
steps.tts_text: In the Settings panel, click Presentation language in the left menu.

steps.display_text: This dropdown controls what your audience sees on their devices. AhaSlides supports 32 audience languages.
steps.tts_text: This dropdown controls what your audience sees on their devices. AhaSlides supports 32 audience languages.

steps.display_text: Let's choose Spanish — Español — for this presentation. All participant-facing text switches to Spanish immediately.
steps.tts_text: Let's choose Spanish — Español — for this presentation. All participant-facing text switches to Spanish immediately.

steps.display_text: The language is saved automatically. Close Settings to return to the editor.
steps.tts_text: The language is saved automatically. Close Settings to return to the editor.

steps.display_text: Click Preview to see exactly what your Spanish-speaking audience will see.
steps.tts_text: Click Preview to see exactly what your Spanish-speaking audience will see.

steps.display_text: The participant interface appears in Español — buttons, navigation, all in Spanish.
steps.tts_text: The participant interface appears in Español — buttons, navigation, all in Spanish.
